About Organization

Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) is a government organization responsible for recruiting employees for Indian Railways.
The RRB is headed by a Chairman and has several members who are experts in their respective fields.

About the Programme

The Railway RRB Junior Engineer programme is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.
The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of Junior Engineer in Indian Railways.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The Railway RRB Junior Engineer programme is a great opportunity for Indian citizens to get a government job.
The selection process is based on a written exam and the eligibility criteria are 10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The best strategy to apply for this programme is to read the notification carefully and check eligibility before applying online.
The application fee is 500/- for General/OBC/EWS and 250/- for SC/ST/PH.
